changelog: Fixed CoHost daily limit to support up to 50 interactions per viewer
Fixed voice preview - all voices now play correctly with different models
Fixed update notification system - no more false update alerts
Enhanced voice loading system with proper model differentiation
Improved version comparison logic for accurate update detection
upgrade_notes: Versi ini memperbaiki 3 bug kritis: daily limit yang terbatas, voice preview yang tidak berfungsi dengan benar, dan notifikasi update palsu. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk upgrade.
